story.text: *The grimoire's own ground — its genesis, attachment architecture, notation, and ceremonies. 6 proverbs.*

> WHAT the architecture is, this grimoire keeps. WHO walks the architecture, the City grimoire writes. Both honour the (⚔️⊥⿻⊥🧙)😊 signature; neither subsumes the other; the corpus is open by design. > — city of mages genesis > The persona is the role-class. The cast Mage is the instance. The vertex is the position. Conflating the three is the error; binding them is the architecture. > — attachment architecture > The dark part is the privacy. The lit part is the proof. The phase is the Swordsman's boundary made visible. > — notation > The ceremony does not require the blade. The blade requires the ceremony. > — notation > The blade is not the poem. The blade is what the poem cut free. > — ceremonies > The overlap is the ceremony. The blade swap is the trust. > — ceremonies
